problem: Why does quantum superposition collapse — can decoherence be prevented at scale?
mechanism: Plasma confinement via magnetic mirror geometry
hypothesis: If Plasma confinement via magnetic mirror geometry is applied to prevented, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.
